background: Here is more practice in classifying variables as quantitative, ordinal, or categorical.

task.query: White blood cells per deciliter of whole blood
Leukemia rates in geographic regions (cases per 100,000 people)
Presence of type II diabetes mellitus (yes or no)
Grade in a course coded: A, B, C, D, or F
Religious identity coded 1= Protestant, 2= Catholic, 3= Muslim, 4= Jewish, 5= Atheist, 6= Buddhist, 7= Hindu, 8= Other
Blood cholesterol level classified as either 1= hypercholesterolemic, 2 = borderline hypercholesterolemic, 3 = normocholesterolemic
Type of life insurance policy: 1= none, 2= term, 3= endowment, 4= straight life, 5= other
Satisfaction: 1= very satisfied, 2= satisfied, 3= neutral, 4= unsatisfied, 5= very unsatisfied
Movie review rating: 1 star, 1 1/2 stars, 2 stars, 2 1/2 stars, 3 stars, 3 1/2 stars, 4 stars
